homeEn.description: CaseFlow Books is a Vietnam-first bilingual bookstore with English/Vietnamese editions, VND pricing, stock visibility, and account-gated checkout.
homeEn.title: CaseFlow Books - Bilingual bookstore

homeVi.description: CaseFlow Books là nhà sách song ngữ ưu tiên Việt Nam, có catalog ấn bản Anh/Việt, giá VND, tồn kho và checkout theo tài khoản.
homeVi.ogTitle: CaseFlow Books - Nhà sách song ngữ

summary.vi: Mot tieu thuyet xa hoi sac sat ve dinh kien, ap luc gia dinh va cai gia cua viec danh gia nguoi khac qua an tuong dau tien. An ban tieng Viet phu hop cho doc gia trong nuoc va viec so sanh song song voi ban tieng Anh.
summary.en: A sharp social novel about judgment, family pressure, and the cost of confusing first impressions with truth. This Vietnamese edition is positioned for local discovery and step-by-step comparison with the English edition.

edition.sampleExcerptPolicy: No commercial excerpt is stored in seed data; use short internal preview copy only.

canonicalSummary.vi: Mot tieu thuyet xa hoi sac sat ve dinh kien, ap luc gia dinh va cai gia cua viec danh gia nguoi khac qua an tuong dau tien.
canonicalSummary.en: A sharp social novel about judgment, family pressure, and the cost of confusing first impressions with truth.

description.vi: Nhung tac pham lau ben, phu hop cho tu sach ca nhan va hoc thuat.
description.en: Enduring works suited for personal libraries and study shelves.

description.vi: Nhung cau chuyen ve tinh cam, hon nhan, lua chon va truong thanh.
description.en: Stories of affection, marriage, choice, and personal growth.

altText.vi: Bia sach tam thoi noi bo cua CaseFlow Books
